mechanics.excerpt: You may ignore all the prerequisites for any path; or enter path not listed your Next Path options by following the procedure outlined below First, and most important; come up with story about how your character avoided the prerequisites_ Tell the gamemaster and write into your character' $ history: For example, your character grew Up on the street, but you want her to proceed directly to military school , you will need to explain how she man ages this, since the Military School Path requires the White Collar or Nobility Path: You might decide that your character befriended ocal mercenary: who turned out t0 be an alumnus of the school in question_ He saw your character' potential and sponsored her for scholarship.
